attacking_style: Launches decisive attacks 5-7km from summit finishes on steep gradient changes, exploiting anaerobic capacity on ramps. Often attacks first but fades if rivals counter, showing limited ability to re-accelerate after initial surge.
team_tactics: Frequently deployed as sacrificial attacker to soften rivals before team leader counters (UAE/INEOS pattern). Benefits from strong TTT positioning and high-tempo trains, but team often prioritizes his domestique role over personal GC ambitions even when well-placed.
terrain_preference: Excels on steep sustained climbs above 2000m with gradient changes (Vallter, Hafeet ramps). Vulnerable in time trials (typically loses 30-56 seconds) and on moderate Cat-2 climbs. Improved TT form in 2021-23 but remains defensive liability.
vulnerability: Collapses when forced to chase accelerations after initiating attacks himself—lacks re-acceleration capacity. Susceptible to illness after cold/wet stages. Descending crashes prevent converting climbing dominance to wins. Struggles in final 2km of sustained efforts (pacing misjudgment pattern).
key_patterns: Attacks 5-7km out on steep climbs but often caught when rivals counter (6+ instances)
Used as sacrificial domestique despite top-5 GC position; UAE/INEOS prioritize team leader over his result (8+ instances)
Loses 30-56 seconds in time trials, forcing aggressive mountain racing to compensate (7+ instances)
Cannot follow re-accelerations after making initial attack; anaerobic capacity depletes quickly (5+ instances)
Strong at altitude (2000m+) but drops on moderate climbs when in poor form (4+ instances)
Learned tactical patience 2018-21: stopped premature attacks, improved late-climb timing (Catalunya/Dauphiné wins)
form_trajectory: neutral: Successfully transitioned to super-domestique role at UAE with podium finish (2023 Tour) while maintaining occasional GC wins (Catalunya 2021). TT improvement evident but sacrificial team tactics now define racing approach versus earlier GC ambitions.
